name: scamradar-x-root
description: Root orchestrator for ScamRadar X full-stack platform

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
scripts.start: concurrently -n "Backend,Frontend,App" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "node print-link.js"
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
